completion_items.detail: Native: CaseTable, CaseOutput, CaseRunResult, and CaseResultCollection stages with template rendering, explicit sequential or bounded parallel typed calculations, deterministic worker slots, lifecycle hooks, calculation-hash/result-SHA resume, verified local result-cache replay, manifests, status summaries, and process-adapter enrichment.
